focus: mcp-coco-index CLI/MCP parity and decision-tree drift

label: CocoIndex maintenance has no working MCP owner
MCP/search telemetry docs overstate emitted fields
MCP startup indexing can race the default refresh path
CLI path scoping differs from MCP and is underdocumented in the reference

direction: Treat dedicated mcp-coco-index MCP as the maintenance owner
reason: The dedicated MCP server intentionally exposes only search; index/status/reset remain CLI-only, and the documented Spec Kit Memory ccc_* fallback is registered but not dispatched.
